mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_rooms WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND ( (owner_id = #{ownerId} AND partner_id = #{partnerId}) OR (owner_id = #{partnerId} AND partner_id = #{ownerId}) ) LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM chat_rooms WHERE chat_room_id = #{chatRoomId} LIMIT 1

SELECT cr.chat_room_id, cr.room_id, r.room_title, CASE WHEN cr.owner_id = #{memberId} THEN cr.partner_id ELSE cr.owner_id END AS partner_id, partner.name AS partner_name, partner.photo_url AS partner_photo_url, COALESCE(cm.message, latest.message) AS last_message, COALESCE(cm.sent_at, latest.sent_at) AS last_message_at FROM chat_rooms cr LEFT JOIN rooms r ON r.room_id = cr.room_id LEFT JOIN members partner ON partner.member_id = CASE WHEN cr.owner_id = #{memberId} THEN cr.partner_id ELSE cr.owner_id END LEFT JOIN chat_messages cm ON cm.message_id = cr.last_message_id LEFT JOIN chat_messages latest ON latest.message_id = ( SELECT cm2.message_id FROM chat_messages cm2 WHERE cm2.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND cm2.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cm2.sent_at DESC, cm2.message_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE ( (cr.owner_id = #{memberId} AND cr.deleted_by_owner = 0) OR (cr.partner_id = #{memberId} AND cr.deleted_by_partner = 0) ) ORDER BY COALESCE(cm.sent_at, latest.sent_at, cr.updated_at, cr.created_at) DESC, cr.chat_room_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_rooms ( room_id, owner_id, partner_id, deleted_by_owner, deleted_by_partner ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{ownerId}, #{partnerId}, #{deletedByOwner}, #{deletedByPartner} )
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_rooms SET deleted_by_owner = CASE WHEN owner_id = #{memberId} THEN 1 ELSE deleted_by_owner END, deleted_by_partner = CASE WHEN partner_id = #{memberId} THEN 1 ELSE deleted_by_partner END WHERE owner_id = #{memberId} OR partner_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE chat_rooms SET last_message_id = #{messageId}, last_message_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE chat_room_id = #{chatRoomId}
